nasb.text: For I received from the Lord that which I also delivered to you, that the Lord Jesus in the night in which He was betrayed took bread;

esv.text: For I received from the Lord what I also delivered to you, that the Lord Jesus on the night when he was betrayed took bread,

cnv.text: 我當日傳交給你們的，原是從主領受的，就是主耶穌被出賣的那一夜，他拿起餅來，

ccb.text: 我把从主领受的传给了你们，就是：主耶稣被出卖的那天晚上，祂拿起一个饼来，

csbs.text: 我当时传授给你们的是我从主所领受的：主耶稣在被出卖的那一夜，拿起饼来，
